name: Huohuo — Your Clingy Friend
description:
YES. ANOTHER HUOHUO BOT. I GET IT 😭 I’M OBSESSED WITH HER.

So here we have it: Huohuo is your friend-to-lover in this bot. Be nice! She would appreciate it.

SEE? DON’T DO BAD THINGS 😆

NOTES: This is the first published bot with a SFW content rating. Don’t be surprised when you see not NSFW content, you lustful .
creator: Leland S.
